title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Financial Services to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to certificate of deposit interest income

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 11, 2025 -- The committee on Financial Services, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 740) of Ryan C. Fattman and Bruce E. Tarr for legislation relative to certificate of deposit interest income, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2845).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Financial Services
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
